meta.question: Which tasks in this model have exactly two associated messages? (Model ID: 3d0f07f9b84c4e31bbca562f472c8885)
meta.finalAnswer: No matching data found: for model ID 3d0f07f9b84c4e31bbca562f472c8885, the RDF graph contains 20 bboExt:MessageFlow elements, but there is no RDF join that links any bboExt:ChoreographyTask to exactly two distinct messages (via bboExt:messageRef on MessageFlow). In this model, MessageFlow sourceRef/targetRef values do not match any task element IDs available as bboExt:ChoreographyTask bbo:id, so the “exactly two associated messages” criterion cannot be computed from the stored links.
